message:
fix(core): correct data structure bugs in rope, wavelet tree, xor filter, and reconciliation

Fix four correctness bugs found during code review:

- rope.rs: Weight and total_len fields track byte lengths, not character
  counts — update documentation to match actual semantics; fix char_at()
  to use byte offset (text.get(pos..)?.chars().next()) instead of
  chars().nth(pos) which treated byte offsets as char indices
- wavelet_tree.rs: Move hi.min(self.data_len) clamping before the range
  validation check, preventing panic when k >= unclamped hi - lo but
  k < clamped hi - lo
- xor_filter.rs: Correct theoretical false-positive rate from 1/255 to
  1/256 (2^-8) for 8-bit and from 1/65535 to 1/65536 (2^-16) for
  16-bit fingerprints — the standard XOR filter FP rate is 2^-f where
  f is fingerprint bits
- self_stabilize.rs: Fix reconciliation protocol to properly handle key
  removal — authority now sends empty-value patches for removed keys,
  and non-authority nodes interpret empty values as deletion markers
  instead of inserting empty data; add tests for removal convergence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
